content.problemStatement:
Complete the given function which doubles the value of variable **x** using pointer.


Input Format

The only line of input will contain a single integer xxx


Output Format

Output 2x2x2x.
content.inputFormat: The first line contains a single integer x.

solution.approach: The problem requires simply doubling the input value x. This can be achieved by multiplying x by 2. The time complexity is O(1) because the operation is constant time, and the space complexity is O(1) as no additional space is used that scales with input size.
